full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #36 (2026-05-19)

PULSE
Health: 0.4746 (C). 1013 wallets, 272 contributors. 11 memos today vs 174 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
25 reward payments, 203070 PFT distributed to 14 contributors. Top earner: raL2kv...Gwzd (38944 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 8,200 PFT. Highest: r4ahFv...5XyU (8,200 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (51,400 PFT, avg 8,567/day over 6 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rMA69k...rcQK (96 memos). Fastest new contributor: rhwiJx...2TaE (45.0 memos/day in 1 days). 91 new wallet(s) this week. 34 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 72.4%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-19): 112 transactions from 25 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
